title: [YTP] SpongeBob Dies
description: Another short clip from my new video. This particular clip took a while to make, since I had a sentence mix, mask spongebob, mask the worm, create the explosions sound, create the explosion effect, and make spongebob run out of the worm's mouth. Programs used in this video - Sony Vegas Pro 9.0, Particle Illusion 3, Paint.net
